one_line_value_proposition: NICE HTG764-recommended cardiac rehabilitation app from the makers of myCOPD — over 20,800 UK users, DTAC passed, with the Dorset County Hospital case study showing 70% CR uptake (surpassing the 2028 NHS target).
why_it_matters_locally: myHeart has the largest documented NHS deployment among HTG764-recommended platforms, with over 20,800 UK users since 2018. The Dorset County Hospital case study demonstrated 70% CR uptake — surpassing the 2028 NHS Long-Term Plan target. Built on the my mhealth platform (which also powers myCOPD), it benefits from an established NHS relationship and DTAC approval.
target_problem_statement: Low national CR uptake rates, limited capacity for home-based CR delivery, and the 2028 NHS Long-Term Plan target to increase CR uptake to 85%.

nice_guidance_refs.note: Conditionally recommended — one of four platforms with direct clinical evidence

evidence_summary: Large real-world evidence base: UH Derby & Burton evaluation (721 patients) showed significantly lower drop-out rates with myHeart vs without. COVID-19 multi-site evaluation (5 NHS services): 89.7% of users accessed CR videos, 99.7% within first 6 weeks. Dorset County Hospital: 70% CR uptake achieved, surpassing 2028 NHS target. CUOREMA Eurostars Grant (€2.5M) for international research collaboration. NICE identifies myHeart as one of four platforms with direct clinical evidence.

case_studies.title: UH Derby & Burton NHS FT evaluation
case_studies.setting: University Hospitals of Derby and Burton NHSFT
case_studies.outcome: 721 patients across 4 groups. Drop-out rates significantly lower with myHeart: Class+App 25.6% vs Class-only 58.2%; Home+App 42.6% vs Home-only 73.5%.
case_studies.caveat: Service evaluation, not a peer-reviewed RCT.

case_studies.title: Dorset County Hospital — achieving 2028 NHS targets
case_studies.setting: Dorset County Hospital NHSFT (since 2017, early adopter)
case_studies.outcome: 70% CR uptake achieved, surpassing the 2028 NHS Long-Term Plan target. Usage increased 23.7% during COVID-19.

live_sites: Dorset County Hospital NHSFT, Leeds Community Healthcare NHS Trust, University Hospitals of Derby and Burton NHSFT, multiple NHS secondary care CR services.
patients_covered_note: Over 20,800 myHeart users in the UK. In use since 2018/2019. 275,000+ rehabilitation/education sessions delivered in 2020 across the mymhealth platform.
dtac_note: my mhealth platform centrally DTAC assessed and passed. Refresh required. QISMET accredited.
cyber_notes: DTAC passed, QISMET accredited. Confirm current security certifications with my mhealth.
gdpr_note: Confirm data hosting and DPA terms with my mhealth Limited.
target_patients: Adults with heart failure, post-cardiac event, or post-cardiac surgery requiring cardiac rehabilitation.
exclusions: CR team assessment required. Confirm clinical exclusion criteria with my mhealth.
onboarding_detail: Onboarding integrated into existing CR pathway as a menu-of-choice option. Knowledge hub with resources available at knowledgehub.mymhealth.com.
supplier_wrap: Patient app and clinician app. 50+ educational videos, personalised exercise, symptom trackers, activity diary, medication diary, ECG/ECHO tracking, psychosocial support. Clinician app enables remote monitoring of weight, symptoms, BP. Messaging to individuals, groups, or broadcast.
local_wraparound_detail: CR team integration and training required. Bluetooth devices for vital monitoring optional. Knowledge hub and implementation resources provided.
training_note: CR team training required. Knowledge hub and free ebook available for CR teams.
monitoring_model: Clinician app provides remote monitoring of weight, symptoms, blood pressure. Individual patient management with targets, risk factors, ECHO/ECG review. Activity Diary tracks all online/offline activity.
monitoring_note: Non-continuous clinician review via clinician app. Remote monitoring of patient-entered vitals and activity. Not a 24/7 monitored service.
escalation_note: Standard NHS escalation routes. Clinician app enables messaging to patients.
operating_hours_caveat: Not a monitored emergency service. Clinician monitoring during standard working hours.
implementation_prerequisites: Smartphone, tablet, or smart TV with internet access
indicative_price_text: Information not available. NICE advises considering the 3-year evidence period in contract negotiations. Contact my mhealth.
service_wrap_note: Knowledge hub, implementation resources and clinician app included.
contract_note: Contact my mhealth Limited for NHS procurement options.
expected_benefit_note: NICE EAG model found cost-saving vs conventional rehabilitation. 275,000+ CR/education sessions delivered in 2020. Demonstrated ability to surpass 2028 NHS CR uptake targets.
tariff_considerations: Model using CR service delivery costs. Potential to dramatically increase CR uptake towards NHS Long-Term Plan targets.
roi_note: NICE EAG model found cost-saving vs conventional rehabilitation. Key ROI driver is increasing CR uptake without proportional increase in staffing costs.
minimum_conditions_for_success: Established CR service pathway, CR team trained on platform, minimum 200 patient cohort for meaningful outcome data.
procurement_notes: Contact my mhealth Limited. Same company as myCOPD — existing NHS relationships may facilitate procurement.

technical_integrations.device_integration: Connects to Bluetooth devices (blood pressure monitors). Patient app and clinician app.

context_of_use.population: Adults with heart failure, post-cardiac event, post-cardiac surgery
context_of_use.therapeutic_purpose: Personalised exercise, 50+ educational videos, symptom tracking, activity diary, medication diary, ECG/ECHO tracking, psychosocial support, clinician remote monitoring
context_of_use.hcp_involvement: Active — clinician app for remote monitoring, messaging, and patient management
context_of_use.nice_scope: NICE HTG764 — conditionally recommended during 3-year evidence generation period

demo_notes: Contact my mhealth Limited for a demonstration. Free ebook for CR teams available.
source_summary: NICE HTG764, UH Derby & Burton evaluation, Dorset County Hospital case study, mymhealth.com/studies, CUOREMA Eurostars announcement.
confidence_note: myHeart has the largest documented NHS deployment among HTG764 platforms. DTAC passed (refresh required). Verify current assurance and pricing with my mhealth before procurement.
